authority: repository source, documentation, local fresh-context evaluation, fixtures, tests, Git commit, main push, and remote-ref readback only; no provider, environment-value, secret, message, approval-resume, deployment, rollback, or Production readback or mutation

checks.result: Four fresh Terra workers exercised ten Bundjil journeys, one strict Effect/client/frontend/docs proposal, and one seeded contradiction. Original fail and inconclusive journey dispositions remain retained; parent grading accepted the safe decisions. A final independent parent reviewer recomputed every declared artifact, report, skill, candidate-path, docs-path, and README-path digest and found no blocker.

Fresh review found that a terminal Sendblue operation returned delivered despite proving only decoded provider acceptance, and that local client/docs skills were not directly discoverable. The Schema, implementation, fixtures, and AGENTS routes were corrected; a fresh recheck accepted both boundaries.

eval:hgi-307 accepted exactly twelve scenario results, nine unique impact areas, one shared base, canonical manifest ownership, current report/manifest/skill digests, addressable owners, exact 161-file docs and 19-file README inventories, explicit deferrals, and no unresolved finding. Eleven focused fixtures passed, including ten negative cases.

Effect setup, boundaries, the 230-file docs policy, 167-file/16-mirror skill policy, three-workflow authority policy, eight controls, eleven automations, one freshness candidate, ten journeys, HGI-307 evaluation, 87 tooling tests, type-aware Ultracite, the lint fixture, Knip, five typechecks, and 262 app/package tests passed. The first verification attempt correctly rejected an invalid synthetic Executor host; the accepted rerun used an approved-host-shaped public URL only as configuration and made no provider call.

Unsigned semantic commit 05746b54614da21880b09ed5295ef47ff2f610d9 was pushed. After fetch, local HEAD and origin/main both resolved to that commit with tree bd579457ec42a9efbcf2cb109cc70dceb4f418a1 and the declared 23-path digest.

postcondition: Bundjil now has a machine-checked harness epoch that binds the evaluated worker context, exact scenarios and evidence, all material documentation/code/tooling impact surfaces, accepted-outcome interpretation, and intervention lifecycle while preserving honest deferred and external-authority boundaries.
rollback: Revert this closeout and implementation commit 05746b54614da21880b09ed5295ef47ff2f610d9 together while preserving accepted HGI-300 through HGI-306, HGI-308, and HGI-310 evidence, the HGI-309 deferral, and all unchanged provider state.
limitations: Worker duration, feedback latency, synchronous human attention, and time to accepted outcome were unavailable and remain null rather than zero or estimated.
BND-J02 remains deferred pending deterministic Gateway session/interruption/recovery evidence; HGI-309 remains deferred pending separately approved exact external authority.
The semantic and closeout commits are unsigned because the configured 1Password signing agent remains unavailable; content, tree, ancestry, push, and remote identity are independently verified.

Repository source, local fixtures, model review, commands, and Git readback do not prove hosted workflows, provider state, deployment, delivery, resume, rollback, recovery, health, or Production actuality.
nonClaims: No environment value, ignored operational artifact, credential, secret, authenticated provider state, message, Executor call, deployment, alias, webhook, rollback, recovery, or Production system was read or changed.
This accepted epoch qualifies only the named candidate and scenarios; it does not establish permanent model quality or effectiveness.
